SEARCH
Package io.github.elevateddev.lattice.edge

Class EdgeSpec

java.lang.Object
io.github.elevateddev.lattice.edge.EdgeSpec
public final class EdgeSpec extends Object
Immutable configuration for an edge between graph nodes.

Edge specs describe queue shape, capacity, wait behavior, overflow handling, memory placement, and optional batching metadata. Builder-style methods return new instances and leave the original spec unchanged.

  • Method Details

    • spscRing

      public static EdgeSpec spscRing(int capacity)
      Creates a single-producer/single-consumer ring edge.

      Use this only when the upstream node has one producer thread. For source ingress, SourceMode.SINGLE_PRODUCER is required.

      Parameters:
      capacity - ring capacity; graph build validates power-of-two limits
      Returns:
      edge spec

    • mpscRing

      public static EdgeSpec mpscRing(int capacity)
      Creates a multi-producer/single-consumer ring edge.
      Parameters:
      capacity - ring capacity; graph build validates power-of-two limits
      Returns:
      edge spec
